headline: Will AbbVie's Neuroscience Franchise Aid Top-line Growth in Q1?
summary: ABBV eyes a strong Q1 performance as neuroscience sales, led by Botox and Vraylar, are set to jump 22%, with newer drugs helping offset declines in legacy treatments.

headline: Voyager Therapeutics: 'Strong Buy' On Inflection Points For VY7523 In AD For 2026
summary: Voyager Therapeutics' anti-tau monoclonal antibody VY7523 demonstrated an excellent safety and PK profile in phase 1 SAD. Read why VYGR stock is a Strong Buy.
